## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Marcel Santilli's content marketing approach to Tiffany Go and Suzanne Holloway, exploring potential collaboration with Interpret.](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise, enabling rapid, high-quality content production at scale](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Interpret seeks to expand market presence, competing with established players like Qualtrics in the customer feedback space](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Content strategy should focus on becoming the best answer for ICP-relevant questions, not just product-specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Balancing thought leadership with SEO-driven content is crucial for Interpret's growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Approach

  - [Combines AI workflows with expert strategists and editors](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Analyzes thousands of potential content opportunities rapidly (e.g., 2,400 assignments for Reddit in first week)](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Uses custom relevancy scores to prioritize content creation](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Publishes content quickly, often within 2-3 weeks of engagement start](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Creates end-to-end content, including staging, graphics, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Interpret's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Tiffany leads product marketing, operating as a "one-woman shop"](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Current focus on paid events, sponsorships, and some paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Challenges include defining core ICP and moving upmarket](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Limited organic growth and domain authority currently](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Debate between long-tail SEO content vs. bespoke thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Need to build foundation for long-term growth while addressing immediate needs](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Challenge: "Voice of customer" has low search volume (1,400/month)](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Opportunity: Create content clusters around related, high-volume topics](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Interpret aims to compete with established players like Qualtrics](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Rapid emergence of AI-native startup competitors](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Strategy: Reverse-engineer successful content approaches of desired competitors](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)

### AI and SEO Concerns

  - [Discussion on potential search engine penalties for AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [fwd.digital's approach focuses on creating valuable, in-depth answers](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Emphasis on understanding user intent and adding unique value beyond basic AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Evaluate Interpret's readiness for engagement with fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Consider parallel-pathing market research with initial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to expand content beyond direct product focus to build authority in related areas](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Assess potential for creating an AI newsletter to build subscriber base, similar to Deepgram's success](https://fathom.video/share/i4NzrJRCA9hm1134yeXgy9BMJay13pG3?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
